title: Google Workspace Posture
description: Google Workspace identity and security posture artifact.

usage_report_date.description: Date of the Google Workspace usage report snapshot (typically yesterday).

org_domain.description: Primary domain of the Google Workspace tenant.

locked_pct.description: Percentage of users currently locked out.

inactive_pct.description: Percentage of active users inactive for 90+ days (from Directory API lastLoginTime).

active_7d_pct.description: Percentage of users who logged in within the last 7 days.

active_30d_pct.description: Percentage of users who logged in within the last 30 days.

2sv_enrolled_pct.description: Percentage of users enrolled in 2-step verification.

2sv_enforced_pct.description: Percentage of users with 2-step verification enforced by policy.

2sv_protected_pct.description: Percentage of users actually protected by 2-step verification.

passkey_users_pct.description: Percentage of users with passkeys enrolled.

security_keys_total.description: Total number of registered security keys across the tenant.

privileged_users_count.description: Number of unique active privileged users across super admin and delegated admin roles.

privileged_users_2sv_enrolled_pct.description: Percentage of active privileged users enrolled in 2-step verification.

privileged_users_2sv_enforced_pct.description: Percentage of active privileged users with 2-step verification enforced.

weak_password_pct.description: Percentage of users with weak passwords.

password_length_non_compliant_pct.description: Percentage of users with passwords that do not meet length requirements.

authorized_apps_count.description: Number of third-party apps authorized in the tenant.

lookback_days.description: Number of days of Context-Aware Access audit history searched for device-state deny events.

context_aware_access_denied_events.description: Total Context-Aware Access deny events observed in the lookback window.

device_state_denied_events.description: Count of deny events that included a device-state parameter, which is positive evidence that a device-state access level fired.

managed_device_requirement_evidenced.description: Whether Context-Aware Access audit logs show device-state-based access denials. This is deny-event evidence, not proof of complete policy coverage.

access_policy_name.description: Access Context Manager policy resource used for config enrichment.

access_policy_parent.description: Parent organization resource for the access policy.

basic_access_levels_count.description: Number of basic Access Context Manager access levels in the resolved policy.

custom_access_levels_count.description: Number of custom CEL-based access levels in the resolved policy. These are not deeply analyzed by the collector.

basic_device_policy_access_levels_count.description: Number of basic access levels that include a devicePolicy condition.

basic_managed_device_access_levels_count.description: Number of basic device-policy access levels that explicitly restrict allowed device management levels to managed devices.

basic_device_policy_access_level_titles.description: Titles of basic access levels that include a devicePolicy condition.

warnings.description: Informational warnings about data gaps or caveats.
